name: USS Larch (AN 21)
events: 10 Mar 1942 USS Larch picks up survivors from the American tanker Gulftrade that was torpedoed and sunk by German U-boat U-588 3 miles off Barnegat Light in position 39°50'N, 73°52'W.
13 Mar 1942 USS Larch picks up 1 survivor from the Chilean merchant Tolten that was torpedoed and sunk by German U-boat U-404 32 miles off Barnegat, New Jersey, USA in position 40°10'N, 73°50'W.
